rows.description: Computus Gu: Paynter aris a 2do die novembris 1700 ad eundem diem 1701.
rows.notes: Consensus on type and no amounts. Gemini-flash description 'aris' is visually accurate, preferred over gpt-5-mini's 'vris'.

rows.description: Imprimis redditt. comput. de remanentib? m cista
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. Gemini-flash description is more visually accurate for 'redditt.', 'remanentib?', and 'm cista', preferred over gpt-5-mini's 'reddit comput. de remanentib. in Cista'.
Amounts are consensus. Gemini-flash description 'I tem' and 'Arragys' is more visually accurate, preferred over gpt-5-mini's 'Item de Arreagijs'.

Gemini-flash description 'Guinear' is visually correct. The raw amount from the image is £28 1s 39d. GPT-5-mini correctly identified the raw value and the pence rule violation. Normalizing 39d (3s 3d) and adding to 1s gives 4s 3d. Gemini-flash performed this normalization, but its note implied an incorrect original shillings value (it should have been 1s, not 1s with 3s added making 4s). Visual confirmation on image shows 01s. Final value is correct after normalization.
Gemini-flash description ('Longwitenam') is correct. GPT-5-mini correctly extracted the visible amount £58 0s 0d which gemini-flash missed entirely. Visual override for amount.

Gemini-flash description 'minhinnet' is visually correct. GPT-5-mini extracted the correct amount £7 10s 0d. Gemini-flash incorrectly repeated the amount from the previous row. Visual override for amount.

Gemini-flash description ('South newington') is visually correct. GPT-5-mini extracted the correct amount £2 15s 7d. Gemini-flash incorrectly repeated an amount from an earlier row. Visual override for amount.

Gemini-flash description 'Merton' (capitalized) is correct. The raw amount from the image is £1 9s 79d. GPT-5-mini correctly identified the raw value and the pence rule violation. Normalizing 79d (6s 7d) and adding to 9s gives 15s 7d. Visual override applied for the normalized amount.
Visual inspection confirms description 'Thrup & sesquianno' and amount £7 10s 0d. Both extractors were incorrect for this row; gemini-flash had an incorrect amount/note, gpt-5-mini was out of sync.
Gemini-flash correctly extracted both description and amount (£0 10s 0d). GPT-5-mini missed this distinct row, indicating it was out of sync.
Gemini-flash correctly extracted both description and amount (£0 8s 6d). GPT-5-mini missed this distinct row, indicating it was out of sync.
Gemini-flash correctly extracted description and amount (£4 13s 4d). GPT-5-mini extracted description but missed the clear amount and was out of sync.

rows.description: Mountague & at dimidio & triennio et dimidio
rows.notes: Gemini-flash correctly extracted both description and the clear amount (£0 10s 0d). GPT-5-mini missed the amount and had slight description inaccuracies, also out of sync.
Gemini-flash correctly extracted both description, amount (£0 8s 4d), and the farthing fraction 'q'. GPT-5-mini extracted the wrong amount and was out of sync.
Gemini-flash correctly extracted description ('Greeneway') and amount (£1 3s 9d). GPT-5-mini had the wrong amount and description 'Greenway', also out of sync.
Gemini-flash correctly extracted description and amount (£2 4s 4d). GPT-5-mini extracted the wrong amount and was out of sync.
Visually confirmed amount (£1 15s 11d 0.5 from '11ob'). Gemini-flash correctly identified the 'ob' fraction and had correct description. GPT-5-mini extracted the wrong amount and was out of sync.
Gemini-flash correctly extracted description and amount (£18 0s 0d). GPT-5-mini had incorrect description and amount, also out of sync.

Visual extraction. The 'Tintinhull' text is a section label. 'Rush & Sesquianno' is a specific entry with amount £0 7s 8d 0.25 (indicated by '4q'). Gemini-flash treated this as a header with no amount. GPT-5-mini merged this description with the next line and only captured one amount, misreading it.
Visual extraction. The amount is £1 3s 9d. Gemini-flash extracted this as a separate entry but had £1 4s 0d. GPT-5-mini merged this description with the previous line but had the correct amount.
Gemini-flash description ('clifton-Ferry' lowercase) is visually more accurate. GPT-5-mini correctly extracted the amount £2 4s 4d, which gemini-flash missed. Visual override for amount.

Description is consensus. Visually confirmed amount £1 15s 11d 0.5 (from '11ob'). GPT-5-mini captured the whole amount correctly. Gemini-flash accurately identified the 'ob' fraction but had an incorrect whole amount. Combined the best parts based on visual.
Consensus on description, type, and no monetary amounts.

rows.description: Trethewin pro triennio et dimidio, Reed m p't
rows.notes: Gemini-flash's description 'Reed m p't' is visually very accurate. Its amount £18 0s 0d is correct. GPT-5-mini misread the pounds as '98' and had a different interpretation of the abbreviation.
Gemini-flash correctly extracted both description ('prosesquianno' as one word) and amount (£1 4s 0d). GPT-5-mini misread the shillings as '14'.
Visual inspection confirms description 'Gent Comoners Martin - Harris' and amount £2 6s 1d 0.5 (from '1ob'). Both extractors missed this amount. Gemini-flash description is slightly more accurate.
Gemini-flash correctly identified that no monetary amounts are present for this row. GPT-5-mini mistakenly extracted amounts from the previous row.

rows.description: Southnewington Tenement & annos of wch 3d for ye former year.
rows.notes: Gemini-flash correctly extracted the detailed description, amount (£2 6s 10d), and the halfpenny fraction 'ob'. GPT-5-mini missed the amount and had a slightly less accurate description.
Consensus on all aspects for the first subtotal line.
Consensus on description, type, and no monetary amounts for this section header.
Gemini-flash correctly extracted description and amount (£28 17s 6d). GPT-5-mini missed the amount.
Gemini-flash correctly extracted description ('Longwitenam') and amount (£28 0s 0d). GPT-5-mini had the wrong amount and description ('Longwittenam').
Gemini-flash correctly extracted description ('minhinett') and amount (£20 0s 0d). GPT-5-mini missed the clear amount and capitalized the description.

rows.description: South newington Ann. m p 20ts more m full for Ann. 1701.
rows.notes: Gemini-flash correctly extracted the detailed description and the amount (£5 0s 0d), which visually appears as '005'. GPT-5-mini misread the pounds as '28'.
Gemini-flash correctly extracted description ('Cudlington Rry.'), amount (£3 3s 0d), and the farthing 'q'. GPT-5-mini misread the description and extracted the wrong amount.
Gemini-flash correctly extracted description and amount (£2 10s 0d). GPT-5-mini misread the pounds as '25'.
Gemini-flash correctly extracted description and amount (£4 0s 0d). GPT-5-mini misread the amount as £3 3s 0d.
Gemini-flash correctly extracted description ('Chacrhill') and amount (£2 0s 0d). GPT-5-mini misread 'Chacehill' and amount as £2 10s 0d.
Gemini-flash correctly identified no monetary amounts for this row. GPT-5-mini misread the description as 'Shrup' and extracted an amount that belongs to the previous row.
Gemini-flash correctly identified no monetary amounts for this row. GPT-5-mini misread the description as 'Luddington' and extracted an amount that belongs to an earlier row.
Consensus on description, type, and no monetary amounts.
Consensus on all aspects for the second subtotal line.
